examples: For a couple of years, I retreated into a life of Bohemian bachelorhood.
His extreme reaction won him a brief respite, but they soon resumed their nagging about his bachelorhood.
Since no woman could stand the situation of her husband's keeping another woman, his bachelorhood was safe.
The alternative was to live as he did, in middle-class squalor, in married bachelorhood.
Albert ended decades of bachelorhood in 2011 when he married South African Olympic swimming champion Charlene Wittstock.
